item.title: Its not just a phase, MOM.
item.dc:creator: Icedtorch

item.title: Bruce Dickinson (Iron Maiden) unboxes my work
item.description:
(Sound on) This is so awesome and unreal. I’m super proud. Bruce Dickinson, lead singer of Iron Maiden, unboxes the book that contains my work. It’s a Piece of Mind anniversary special edition (Z2Comics). The first spread contains the pop-up I’ve designed. This was great to work on and it’s so rewarding to see this video!
Montage of the pop-up spread
Photo of the open pop-up More info and how I’ve made it in this post: https://imgur.com/gallery/y2oq57E
item.dc:creator: PaulDeGraaf

item.title: Fuck billionaires
item.description: It's not a full blown strike outside of Sweden yet, but I sure hope it's coming. item.title: When you find "the one" in your mid 40s
item.description: It's weird. Dating in your middle age, I mean. It's alot like my college days, only this go round - everyone is crazy instead of just drunk.

item.dc:creator: sirbinlid

item.title: Wholesome GIF dump to improve your Thursday :)
item.description:
1. Her name is 曦曦鱼SAKANA.
2. Here is how it looks side by side! You can find here channel on YouTube for more of here work!
3
4
5
6
8
9
10
11
12. And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working games in the past few years. From scratch basically and we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our third game is close to release. It's inspired by the "The Stanley Parable" (same kinda of style and humor) and it would mean the world to us if you wishlisted the game on Steam. Check out the page here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ I wish you all success in your personal passion projects! It's a blast to work on one :)))
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I want a cool painting or drawing, and I've never tried getting anything to the front page before. Here we go.
item.description: Front page edit: WE GOT THERE! Thanks for your help, everybody, and hopefully I'll be back with a cool picture to show off for all our hard work.

item.title: Stagehand nonsense
item.description: Our crew didn't put it all together until he dropped a 400+ pound box of cables on my chest. I objected, loudly. The others came forward. We revolted. Extra Edit: The show was excellent.
item.dc:creator: AngurProne

item.title: Just screaming into the void.
item.description: Like any other Wednesday, I got up and went to work. Was praised by my usually flippant boss a couple of different times throughout the day. Small things, but called out in front of others for getting shit done. Nice... Got off work and drove to school for my final. Not only did I nail it, but was also called out for HOW I did so despite being at a pretty significant disadvantage (that part was actually because I shot myself in the foot earlier in the semester.) Still, very cool. After class, I got some digits! We'll see how things go with girlie, but it was certainly a nice topper for the day. Sometimes, days like these really come along just when you need them the most. Keep truckin', internet people.
item.dc:creator: Jumumbles
